title: indulgent coconut portuguese vanilla tart
description: a fresh, fluffy portuguese tart featuring a coconut-cream-crack crust and a creamy vanilla custard

ingredients.name: kosher salt
ingredients.notes: for the coconut-cream-crack crust and vanilla custard

instructions: in a medium bowl, whisk together the flour, unsweetened shredded coconut, and granulated sugar for the coconut-cream-crack crust.
add the unsalted butter and mix until the mixture forms a crumbly mixture.
press the mixture into the bottom of a bamboo tray or tart pan with a removable bottom.
bake the crust for 10-12 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
remove the crust from the oven and let it cool slightly.
in a separate bowl, whisk together the egg yolks, granulated sugar, and vanilla extract for the vanilla custard.
add the heavy cream and mix until the mixture is smooth and well combined.
pour the vanilla custard into the cooled coconut-cream-crack crust.
bake the tart for an additional 15-18 minutes or until the filling is set and the crust is golden brown.
remove the tart from the oven and let it cool completely before serving.
just before serving, sprinkle the large coconut flakes over the top of the tart for garnish
